_meta.notes: News/announcement posts live at root flat slugs. Typical structure: featured image, title H1, posted-date or 'X months ago', category tags (linking to /Industries/{slug}/), multi-paragraph body prose, and optional image embeds within the body.

prompt: Extract a warehausae.com news/announcement post. Capture title, published date, featured image, categories (with their URLs), and the full multi-paragraph body. Inline images should be captured both in the body markdown and in the images array.
systemPrompt: Extracting one news post from warehausae.com. Use null or empty arrays for missing fields. Do not invent dates or category tags.

title.description: Post title shown in the H1.

published_date_text.description: Date as displayed (literal). May be relative like '5 months ago' or absolute like 'December 15, 2025'.

featured_image_url.description: URL of the lead/featured image at the top of the post.

categories.description: Category tags shown above or below the title.

body_markdown.description: Full body of the post in markdown form. Preserve image references inline.

inline_images.description: All images that appear in the post (deduplicated).
